This means that any test where the zone is null and relies on returning the default would fail now. With the mutant change, this isn't happening anymore, leading to an NPE or incorrect behavior.

On the other hand, TestMonthDay_Properties is passing because its test wasn't directly affected by this mutation. It might have been fixed due to some unrelated reason, but I don't see a direct link here.
